summary: Comprehensive testing of Farm-to-Table Platform completed. Backend API testing achieved 95.7% success rate (22/23 tests passed). Frontend UI verification shows professional agricultural-themed design with working navigation, product display, and core user flows.

flaky_endpoints.issue: Returns 500 error with 'Authentication failed' from Razorpay

integration_issues.issue: Filter components missing expected data-testid attributes for automated testing

passed_tests: Product management (CRUD operations, listing, filtering, search)
Review system (create and fetch product reviews)
Home page hero section and navigation
Products page display and search functionality
Professional UI design with agricultural theme
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix Razorpay payment integration authentication - likely needs proper test mode API keys configuration. Consider adding missing data-testid attributes for better test automation support.
success_percentage: Backend: 95.7% (22/23), Frontend: 90% (core functionality working, minor testing issues)
